title: A New Green Snake Found in China
summary: Scientists have found a new type of green snake in the mountains of China. This snake is called the Huaxi Green Pitviper, and it lives in a place with lots of plants and animals. It is green to hide in the grass and has amber eyes. People thought it was another snake, but DNA tests showed it is different. The snake is named after an old Chinese philosopher, Laozi, who taught about living in harmony with nature. It is venomous, which means it can bite and hurt people, so it's important to be careful. The discovery shows that there are still many animals we don't know about in nature.

background_read: This article is about a new snake species discovered in China. Snakes are reptiles that live in many places around the world. Some snakes are venomous, meaning they have poison that can harm people. Scientists use DNA to study animals and find out if they are new species. The discovery shows that even in places we think we know, there can be surprises in nature.
Article_Structure: WHAT: Found a new green snake called Huaxi Green Pitviper
WHERE: In the mountains of western Sichuan, China
WHY: To learn about new animals and protect nature

perspectives.description: Finding new species helps us understand biodiversity.
